_comment: Feature tracking file for Xavier2 Cognitive Memory System.

features.description: Unified durable storage direction using SQLite + SQLite-vec for vector and graph data
steps: Store high-dimensional vectors for semantic search
Store graph nodes for belief relationships
features.notes: SQLite + sqlite-vec is the production-ready default backend since v0.4.x.

features.description: Hybrid Search combining BM25 keyword matching and vector retrieval
steps: Perform vector search in the active memory runtime
features.notes: Validated through tests and benchmark smoke execution. Retrieval quality remains strong, but current benchmark latency is above the older <500ms target.

features.description: Belief Graph for conceptual relationship mapping
steps: Implement extraction logic for agent insights
features.notes: Current belief graph module is covered by passing tests in `memory/belief_graph.rs`.

features.description: HTTP-first integration surface with optional Model Context Protocol (MCP) support
steps: Expose authenticated HTTP endpoints for memory and code operations
Expose memory search as a tool
Verify connectivity through HTTP and MCP clients
features.notes: The integrated binary exposes authenticated HTTP handlers in `server/http.rs` and an MCP surface in `server/mcp_server.rs`.

features.description: AST-backed code indexing and symbol search through the `code-graph` sidecar
steps: Initialize SQLite index for code symbols
Persist index path via `XAVIER2_CODE_GRAPH_DB_PATH` across local, test, and Docker runs
features.notes: Validated with HTTP handler tests, e2e startup, and benchmark smoke runs.

features.description: Source Code Reference (SRC) - Comprehensive documentation of all source files
steps: Document core modules (a2a, agents, memory, server, tasks)
features.notes: GitCore Monitor executed 2026-03-20: 78 projects analyzed, 153 modules found. SRC.md central index updated from 43 to 78 projects.
